title: Cincinnati Financial (CINF) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates
text: Cincinnati Financial (CINF) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.82% and 0.12%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: What Awaits Cincinnati Financial (CINF) in Q3 Earnings?
text: Cincinnati Financial's (CINF) third-quarter 2022 results are likely to reflect higher standard lines new business, premium growth initiatives and higher dividend income, offset by higher cat loss.

title: Cincinnati Financial Schedules Webcast to Discuss Third-Quarter 2022 Results
text: CINCINNATI , Oct. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Cincinnati Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: CINF) invites you to listen to the live internet broadcast of its conference call to discuss third-quarter 2022 results on Tuesday, November 1, 2022, at 11 a.m. ET. The company plans to release its results on Monday, October 31, after the close of regular trading on the Nasdaq Stock Market.

title: Cincinnati Financial: This Dividend King Is Becoming Interesting
text: CINF has raised its dividend for 61 consecutive years and thus it is a Dividend King, with one of the longest dividend growth streaks in the investing universe. CINF has incurred a 25% correction since my previous article.

title: 3 Stocks With Dividends You Can Trust to Ride Out the Bear Market
text: Dividend stocks can be an excellent source of income and stability for your portfolio.

title: Cincinnati Financial's Unique Investment Portfolio Makes It A Mini-Berkshire Hathaway
text: Cincinnati Financial's equity-sensitive portfolio is relatively unique in the industry, like Berkshire Hathaway, and has weighed on the stock. While underwriting was disappointing, price increases and moderating inflation should help going forward.

title: Cincinnati Financial (CINF) Rides on Premiums Amid Cat Loss
text: Agent-centered business model, improving premium, industry-leading margins, solid capital position poise Cincinnati Financial (CINF) well for growth.
